response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song 'Ridin'on Dreams' playing throughout. 2. Performed search queries for lyrics. 3. Found lyrics, composer, and artist details in search results. 4. Segmented video chronologically based on thematic visual shifts (messages, Lawson announcement, Super Expo/Bandai announcement, event montage). 5. Populated JSON with song metadata, lyrics, and scene breakdown.
response.global_summary: This video is a promotional clip for 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams'. Throughout the video, the theme song 'Ridin'on Dreams' by the Hololive IDOL PROJECT plays in the background, accompanying various slides featuring fan messages, and later, event announcements for LAWSON, BANDAI NAMCO, and general event montages.

scenes.description: A continuous presentation of static slides featuring fan messages for the Hololive 7th fes. The event theme song, 'Ridin'on Dreams', plays in the background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
今すぐに伝えたいんだ
さあ乗り込もう！
Ridin' on dreams
Yeah!!
Wow oh oh...
Hey!!(Hey!!) Hey!!(Hey!!)
Yeah!!

あぁ小さな夢から
想像できないような
想いになったんだ
わくわく止まらない!
何度迷ったって僕ら
絆が舵になる
ちょっとの不安だってさ
吹き飛ばせちゃうんだよ
果てない旅路を今
漕いでる途中に困難もあるでしょう
それも力に変えて
一緒に進むんだよ!
ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、夢では終われ
ない
荒波も乗り越えていこう
"らしく"輝いていたい
ねえ、君と会えたことが
ねえ、宝物だから
手を取り合い声かけ合って
地図など無い未知の世界で
まだまだ行こう!
Ridin' on dreams
Wow oh oh...
Hey!!(Hey!!) Hey!!(Hey!!)
Yeah!!

急な風が僕らの
行く先乱そうとも
あの日誓ったんだ
覚悟は揺るがない
ちゃんとしなきゃ!って背中
明日への橋になる
もっと大事にしなきゃね
"あたりまえ"は無いから
小さな船から始まるストーリー
どっから始めたらいいかもがいて
少しずつね輪になって見つけた
何にも代えられない夢だ
Wow oh oh oh oh oh
未完成も愛して
Wow oh oh oh oh oh
想いは一つだ
Wow oh oh oh oh oh
僅かな希望でも
僕と君でずっと
馬鹿にされても
信じたい!
ねえ、ありがとうじゃ足りない
ねえ、想いが溢れちゃうんだよ
ずっと一緒だよ!
ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、夢では終われ
ない
荒波も乗り越えていこう
"らしく"輝いていたい
ねえ、君と会えたことが
ねえ、宝物だから
手を取り合い声かけ合って
地図など無い未知の世界で
まだまだ行けるから!
ひとりじゃない
何度でも立ち上がってさ
笑い合っていたい
願いだってみんなで、さあ!
手を繋いで想像も超えて
まだまだ行こう!
Ridin' on dreams
Wow oh oh...
Hey!!(Hey!!) Hey!!(Hey!!)
Yeah!!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, it's because you were there.
Hey, I want to tell you 'thank you' so many times,
right now.
Come on, let's ride!
Ridin' on dreams!
Yeah!!
Wow oh oh...
Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!)
Yeah!!

Ah, from a small dream,
it became a feeling I couldn't have imagined.
The excitement won't stop!
No matter how many times we get lost, our
bonds become the rudder.
I can blow away even a little bit of anxiety.
I'm in the middle of rowing through the endless journey.
There must be difficulties, too.
Turn those into strength as well, and
we'll go forward together!

Hey, it's because you were there.
Hey, we can't end it as a dream.
Let's overcome the rough seas.
I want to keep shining 'like us'.
Hey, the fact that I could meet you,
hey, it's a treasure,
so we hold hands, call out to each other,
and in this unknown world without maps,
let's keep going!

Ridin' on dreams
Wow oh oh...
Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!)
Yeah!!

Even if sudden winds try to disrupt where we go,
I swore it that day,
my determination will not waver.
'I have to do it properly!', my back
becomes the bridge to tomorrow.
We have to cherish it more,
because there's no such thing as 'natural'.
It's a story that starts from a small boat.
Struggling with where to start,
little by little, I found it when we became a circle,
it's a dream that cannot be replaced by anything.

Wow oh oh oh oh oh
Love even the incomplete,
Wow oh oh oh oh oh
our feelings are one.
Wow oh oh oh oh oh
Even with a slight hope,
with you and me, forever,
even if they make fun of us,
I want to believe!

Hey, 'thank you' isn't enough.
Hey, the feelings are overflowing.
We'll be together forever!

Hey, it's because you were there.
Hey, we can't end it as a dream.
Let's overcome the rough seas.
I want to keep shining 'like us'.
Hey, the fact that I could meet you,
hey, it's a treasure,
so we hold hands, call out to each other,
and in this unknown world without maps,
I know we can still keep going!

We are not alone.
Stand up again and again,
I want us to keep laughing together.
Let's make this wish happen together, come on!
Hold hands and go beyond our imagination,
let's keep going!

Ridin' on dreams
Wow oh oh...
Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!)
Yeah!!
